vicious_mockery.name: Vicious Mockery
vicious_mockery.description: You unleash a string of insults laced with subtle enchantments.

healing_word.name: Healing Word
healing_word.description: A creature of your choice that you can see regains HP equal to 1d4 + spellcasting modifier.

cure_wounds.name: Cure Wounds
cure_wounds.description: A creature you touch regains 1d8 + spellcasting modifier HP.

sacred_flame.name: Sacred Flame
sacred_flame.description: Flame-like radiance descends on a creature, which must succeed on a DEX save or take 1d8 radiant damage.

magic_missile.name: Magic Missile
magic_missile.description: Three darts of magical force automatically hit a target for 1d4+1 force damage each.

shield_spell.name: Shield
shield_spell.description: An invisible barrier of magical force appears to deflect attacks. +5 AC until start of next turn.

detect_magic.name: Detect Magic
detect_magic.description: For the duration, you sense the presence of magic within 30 feet of you.

bless.name: Bless
bless.description: Up to three creatures add 1d4 to attack rolls and saving throws.

thunderwave.name: Thunderwave
thunderwave.description: A wave of thunderous force sweeps out from you. Creatures must CON save or take 2d8 thunder damage.

guiding_bolt.name: Guiding Bolt
guiding_bolt.description: A flash of light streaks toward a creature. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, 4d6 radiant damage, and the next attack against it has advantage.

charm_person.name: Charm Person
charm_person.description: You attempt to charm a humanoid you can see. It must succeed on a WIS save or be charmed for 1 hour.

fire_bolt.name: Fire Bolt
fire_bolt.description: You hurl a mote of fire at a creature. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, 1d10 fire damage.
